mnemonics.title: Transmission Modes
mnemonics.content: Silly Hamsters Fight: Simplex (One-way), Half-duplex (Alternate), Full-duplex (Both)

acronyms.expansion: Carrier Sense Multiple Access with Collision Detection

visualTips.visualization: Imagine post office sorting letters (frames) to different streets (ports) using MAC addresses
Picture multiple cars (data packets) trying to merge into single lane (hub network)

analogies.analogy: Router is like GPS for inter-city routes (IP), switch is local traffic cop directing neighborhood traffic (MAC)
